character.name: Create a professional 64x64 pixel
character.prompt: Create a professional 64x64 pixel art sprite of an Order Hunter (The Order) from Marvel Comics for a 2D Tower Defense/RPG game. Design an elite anonymous hunter serving The Order, not a specific named character. Athletic adult with a lean, highly trained physique. Wear dark navy and silver tactical armor with layered shoulder plates, reinforced chest armor, armored forearms, fitted combat pants, knee guards, and heavy combat boots. Cover the face with a sleek metallic mask featuring narrow glowing blue eye lenses and a dark hood over the helmet. Add a dark blue cape reaching the knees, a tactical belt with pouches, and subtle silver insignias representing a secret organization. Hold a long double-edged spear with a metallic silver blade and dark handle resting beside the body. Stand in a disciplined combat-ready stance with both hands gripping the spear. Use dark blue, silver, black, glowing blue accents, and subtle metallic highlights. Professional high-quality pixel art with clean outlines, strong shading, high contrast, crisp silhouette, consistent lighting from the upper left, and excellent readability at small size. Transparent background, centered character, no text, no UI, no logos, no extra characters, and no visual effects. The final image must be a single game-ready 64x64 pixel sprite.
